title: Ninjagblocks
description: Welcome the world of Ninjago to your Minecraft experience! with all new items, armor and structures. Become a ninja with the pedestal block, or visit a monastery. Ninjago is at your fingers.
body:
This mod is made for those who want to relive Ninjago using Minecraft.

Features:

New weapons: Katana, Scythe, Shurikens, Nunchucks, and their golden and elemental varients.\

New structures: Monastary, And Spinjitzu Outpost

New block: The Pedestal

The mod is made for Neoforge and was made in MCcreator.
